title: Bright Lights
writer: Jessie Burns, Richard Connell, William M. Conselman
actors: Charles Ray, Pauline Starke, Lilyan Tashman
plot: Tom loves Patsy, but she lives in the city while he is every bit the country bumpkin. When an invention of his sells, he decides to take the money and go to the city. There he will show Patsy that he can be just what he thinks she...
